install.title: Gridix - Bitrix24 Connection
install.entrypointDescription: This page is the Bitrix24 connection entry point. Open it with domain and member_id parameters.
install.claimedSuccess: Done. Integration is linked to your account.
install.needsInstallPrimary: Install the Gridix app from the Bitrix24 marketplace first. After installation you will be redirected to the completion page.
install.needsInstallSecondary: If the app is already installed, reinstall it or refresh this page.
install.loginHint: Sign in or register in Gridix - linking will be completed automatically.
install.claimHint: Click the button below to link this Bitrix installation to account {{email}}.

toast.connected: Bitrix is linked to your Gridix account
toast.loginFirst: Please sign in to Gridix first

page.title: Gridix - Bitrix
page.missingParams: Bitrix parameters are missing (domain/member_id). Open this page from the Gridix app inside Bitrix24.

apartmentDetails.syncHint: Apartment data (price/number/project/address, etc.) will be written to the Bitrix deal, and a local lead will be created in Gridix for synchronization.
